name: The Bandwagon
text:
Trample
The Bandwagon's power and toughness are each equal to the number of Voters you control.
Whenever The Bandwagon attacks, each opponent may have a Voter they control hop on (gain control of it for you). Most people just want to be on the winning side.
Crew 2
flavorText: Everybody loves a parade, especially when the alternative is being parade-adjacent in the wrong direction.
